description: Sector overlay for vessels, shipping operators, seafarers, ports, maritime safety/security, certification, and maritime documentation in Ghana.

metadata.scope: Ghana-only sector overlay controls for Maritime and Shipping. Intended to be used with ghana_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Ghana legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Merchant Shipping Regulations and related GMA instruments
National Communications Authority licensing and authorisation

rules.title: Ghana Maritime Authority licence, certificate, or approval evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for GMA registration, vessel certificate, approval, permit, or maritime authorization evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Maritime safety, manning, training, or watchkeeping evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for safety management, crew training, manning, watchkeeping, competency, emergency, or vessel operation controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Maritime communications or radio authorisation evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for NCA maritime radio services, ship radio, frequency, or communications authorisation evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: National Communications Authority licensing and authorisation

rules.title: Crew, passenger, or customer data protection controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for privacy, data protection, consent, passenger data, crew records, retention, or secure handling evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
